scheme_name: Safai Karmakar Ke Bachche Hetu Chhatravrtti Yojana
page_title: Safai Karmakar Ke Bachche Hetu Chhatravrtti Yojana

details: Labor Department of Chhattisgarh State started this scheme "Safai Karmakar Ke Bachche Hetu Chhatravrtti Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015. The main objective of the scheme to provides financial assistance to the children of sanitation workers in India for higher education.
benefits: Financial assistance provided according to the below table
Studying for professional level, doing PhD or research work
eligibility: Only 2 sons/daughters of registered sanitation workers are eligible for the scholarship.
The scholarship is provided for studying different courses.

After admission in college/polytechnic or other course for engineering or medical education, the students receiving scholarship amount under this scheme but student must study for minimum one year in that course.
If such a student is eligible to receive scholarship amount under any scheme of any other government department/institution, then he/she can choose any one scheme which is beneficial for him/her.
The student cannot avail benefits of two schemes simultaneously.

online: All the applicant have to visit the official
On the home page click on "
" under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board".
What do you want to do : "Aavedan"
Check the eligibility criteria for registration in Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board and click next.
Select your district name and provide old/new registration number and click next.
Fill out the online with required details.

documents_required: Mark certificate of previous year exam.

faqs.question: What is this scheme ?
faqs.answer: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Safai Karmakar Ke Bachche Hetu Chhatravrtti Yojana" for unorganized worker on 11 March 2015.

faqs.question: What is the objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The main objective of the scheme to provides financial assistance to the children of sanitation workers in India for higher education.

faqs.question: Who can get the benefits?
faqs.answer: All eligible registered unorganized labor individuals from Chhattisgarh State.

faqs.question: How many children of a parent will eligible for the benefits?
faqs.answer: Only 2 sons/daughters of registered sanitation workers are eligible for the scholarship

faqs.question: Can applicant get the benefits of parallel scheme from the state government ?
faqs.answer: Applicant must not receiving any other parallel scheme of the state government.

faqs.question: What is the procedure to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicant must be registered under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board". Only than applicant can apply for the scheme.

faqs.question: How can applicant register under Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board" ?
faqs.answer: 1. All the applicant have to visit the official website Chhattisgarh Labour Department. 2. On the home page click on "Apply" under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board". 3. Enter the following details, Select Group Name : "Asangathit Marmakaar Mandal" Select Service : "Asangathit Shramik Panjikaran" What do you want to do : "Aavedan"Click next. 4. Check the eligibility criteria for registration in Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board and click next. 5. Fill out the online "Registration form". 6. Submit.

faqs.question: How to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: 1. All the applicant have to visit the official website Chhattisgarh Labour Department. 2. On the home page click on "Apply" under "Chhattisgarh Unorganized Workers State Social Security Board". 3. Provide the required details. 4. Fill out the application form. 5. Submit.
